settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day return on all unopened products in their original packaging. If a product has caused an unexpected skin reaction, please contact us directly — we'll work with you individually. To start a return, email hello@velourskin.com with your order number.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard UK delivery takes 2–3 business days. Express next-day delivery is available for orders placed before 2pm Monday–Friday. International delivery to EU countries typically takes 4–6 business days. Full details are on our shipping policy page.

settings.question: Can I get personalised skincare advice?
settings.answer: Yes — and it's free. Mention in your message that you'd like skincare advice, along with your skin type, primary concern, and any products you're currently using. One of our skin specialists will respond with a tailored routine recommendation.

settings.question: Are your products suitable during pregnancy?
settings.answer: Most are, with one exception: our Age-Defy Serum contains Retinol, which is not recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding. Our Bright-C, Hydra-Boost, Barrier Repair, Calm, and Glow Elixir serums are all considered safe during pregnancy. As always, consult your healthcare provider if you have specific concerns.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale or partnership enquiries?
settings.answer: Yes — we work with select independent retailers, spas, and clinical practices. If you're interested in stocking Velour Skin or a collaboration, please contact us at hello@velourskin.com with the subject line 'Partnership' and we'll be in touch within three business days.
